snippet.title: "To Begin Again" - Ingrid Michaelson x ZAYN (Official Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
To Begin Again Merch Collection is here! https://shop.ingridmichaelson.com/

Lyric Video by Kelly Ford
Cover Illustration by Milkglass 

âTo Begin Againâ Ingrid Michaelson x ZAYN
Written by Ingrid Michaelson, Sarah Aarons and ZAYN
Produced by Sam de Jong
Mixed by Rob Kinelski
Mastered by Emily Lazar

Lyrics:
When the world was ending
Iâd hold you in my arms
And we talked about the places weâd never been
When the world was ending
Weâd hold on to the past
Because itâs all we thought that we would ever see
But then the sun came right back
And the birds sang as if nothing had happened

And, itâs alright
Itâs ok
We will get
Another day
To begin again, to begin again, to begin again
I donât know how
I donât know why
But I know that I will try
To begin again, to begin again, to begin
To live and love and breathe again

When the world was ending
We looked up at the sky
And we talked about the last song that weâd play
So far from comprehending
Theyâd lift us to the stars
Never seen each other from so far away
But then the sun came right back
And the kids played as if nothing had happened

And, itâs alright
Itâs ok
We will get
Another day
To begin again, to begin again, to begin again
I donât know how
I donât know why
But I know that I will try
To begin again, to begin again, to begin
To live and love and breathe again

And cry because Iâm happy
And hold my friends like long lost lovers
Be kind to me and love each other
The world keeps spinning on

Itâs alright
Itâs ok
We will get another day
 
I donât know how
I donât know when
But I do know that we can
Try to begin again, to begin again
To begin to live and love and breathe again

snippet.title: Mira Esto Antes De Que Se Estrene Liga De La Justicia De Zack Snyder
snippet.description:
HBO Max estrenarÃĄ la versiÃģn de Snyder de Liga De La Justicia, de cuatro horas de duraciÃģn. Cuando filmaba Liga De La Justicia, Snyder sufriÃģ una pÃĐrdida familiar muy grande, y se alejÃģ antes de poder terminarla. Warner Bros. contratÃģ a Joss Whedon, que ya habÃ­a demostrado su capacidad para crear equipos de superhÃĐroes con The Avengers en el Universo CinematogrÃĄfico de Marvel, para que terminara la pelÃ­cula. Whedon no se limitÃģ a terminar lo que Snyder empezÃģ: sino que reescribiÃģ y volviÃģ a rodar la mayor parte de la pelÃ­cula, segÃšn The Boys, Warner Bros. decidiÃģ que "la reescritura de Joss era realmente buena."

Pero Liga De La Justicia se estrenÃģ en noviembre del 2017, y fue declarada una decepciÃģn. Mezclaba torpemente los diÃĄlogos ÃĄgiles de Whedon con el ambiente austero de Snyder, ademÃĄs de tener dificultades para presentar a los nuevos miembros del equipo. Poco tiempo despuÃĐs, los fans y estrellas como Gal Gadot y Ben Affleck exigieron en Twitter que Warner liberara la versiÃģn de Snyder con el hashtag #ReleaseTheSnyderCut.

Ahora, por fin llegÃģ el momento. La version de Zack Snyder de Liga De La Justicia llega el 18 de marzo a HBO Max. AquÃ­ va todo lo que necesitas saber.

snippet.title: Justin Bieber: Tiny Desk (Home) Concert
snippet.description:
The Tiny Desk is working from home for the foreseeable future. Introducing NPR Music's Tiny Desk (home) concerts, bringing you performances from across the country and the world. It's the same spirit â stripped-down sets, an intimate setting â just a different space.

Stephen Thompson | March 17, 2021
If you were to apply one of those "how it started / how it's going" memes to Tiny Desk (home) concerts â which began, it turns out, almost exactly one year ago â you'd have, under "how it's going," the image of pop superstar Justin Bieber as he and his band perform the world premiere of a new song called "Peaches."

"Peaches" will exist in a significantly different form when Bieber drops his new album Justice on Friday â the track will feature guest vocals from GIVEÅN and Daniel Caesar â just as "Holy," another song from Justice, opens this set without the presence of guest Chance the Rapper. But Bieber's Tiny Desk set, performed with the aid of We the Band, provides the fullest taste yet (fully 25 percent!) of the singer's sixth album, whose singles have already been streamed hundreds of millions of times.

Bieber has had a massive month as he prepares for Justice to drop: March 2021 began with the singer's 27th birthday and recently produced his second career Grammy, as he took the prize for best country duo or group performance for "10,000 Hours" with Dan + Shay. It continues with this, his Tiny Desk debut. Friday, the next chapter officially begins.

SET LIST
"Holy"
"Peaches"
"Hold On"
"Anyone"

MUSICIANS
Justin Bieber: vocals, keys
Harv: bass
O'Neil "Doctor O" Palmer: keys
DJ Tay James: DJ
Robert Taylor: drums
Julian McGuire: guitar

CREDITS
Video: Nick Demoura, Mike Drew, Rory Kramer, Aaron Kroger, James Coker
Audio: Jim Ebdon, Dylan Ely, James Roach, Chris Houghton, Taylor Meyer
Production Manager: Chris Gratton
Camera Operators: Austin Wavra, Daniel Mardoyan, Noel Galan
Lighting Tech: Jim Mecsery

TINY DESK TEAM
Producer: Bobby Carter
Video Producers: Maia Stern, Morgan Noelle Smith
Audio Mastering: Josh Rogosin
Tiny Production Team: Bob Boilen, Kara Frame
Executive Producer: Lauren Onkey
Senior VP, Programming: Anya Grundmann

snippet.title: ÂĄLAS HORMIGAS PINTARON A UNA LARVA! Primer logro de mis HORMIGAS de JARDIN
snippet.description:
ÂĄHoy continuamos los experimentos con hormigas! Vamos a alimentar a mis hormigas con larvas y capullos, por supuesto utilizando el mismo sirop de colores y de azucar que utilizamos en el video pasado. Si nunca habias visto hormigas que cambian de color, pues estas a punto de ver algo increible. Vamos a ver un poco como viven las hormigas y su reaccion a este sirop de colores y a las larvas. Veremos como se alimentan las hormigas y les mostraremos los resultados inesperados en camara lenta. Ya no hay mas nada que contarles, solo vamos a comenzar de una vez con los experimentos divertidos y a ver a nuestras hormigas que cambian de color y ver que ocurre con las larvas. No te despegues del canal de los mejores experimentos, si te preguntas que hacer cuando estas aburrido, ya tienes la respuesta! Asi que vamos a experimentar

ÂĄSuscribir! - https://www.facebook.com/ellocotimon/

Si nunca habias visto hormigas que cambian de color, pues estas a punto de ver algo increible. Vamos a ver un poco como viven las hormigas y su reaccion a este sirop de colores y a las larvas. Veremos como se alimentan las hormigas y les mostraremos los resultados inesperados en camara lenta. Ya no hay mas nada que contarles, solo vamos a comenzar de una vez con los experimentos divertidos y a ver a nuestras hormigas que cambian de color y ver que ocurre con las larvas. No te despegues del canal de los mejores experimentos, si te preguntas que hacer cuando estas aburrido, ya tienes la respuesta! Asi que vamos a experimentar

ÂĄSuscribir! - https://www.facebook.com/ellocotimon/

âš Para propuestas comerciales: timon@mediacube.in 

Este canal es la VERSIÃN OFICIAL del canal TimOn ChaveS para la audiencia hispanohablante.

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgiaââ

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-ââ...

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listââ...

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listââ...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagramââ
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebookââ
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficialââ
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitterââ
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeââ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaâ #FutureNostalgiaâ #Grammys

Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitterââ
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeââ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaâ #FutureNostalgiaâ #Grammys

Buscando 27 mil dÃģlares por el 25% de participaciÃģn, ÂŋConseguirÃĄ el capital que necesita?

#SharkTankMx #OroRojo #ChileChiltepÃ­n #Emprendedores #Inversionistas #MÃĐxico

ÂĄDisfruta de los productos que has visto en el Tanque a travÃĐs de la tienda oficial de Shark Tank MÃĐxico! http://www.amazon.com.mx/sharktankmx

Bienvenido al canal oficial de SHARK TANK MÃXICO, el reality de emprendimiento y negocios que otorga a sus participantes la oportunidad de presentar proyectos de inversiÃģn, con la esperanza de asegurar el respaldo econÃģmico para su emprendimiento; ademÃĄs de aprovechar la experiencia que tienen los inversionistas ââtiburonesâ- para lograr llevar su negocio a un crecimiento exponencial.

Con cinco temporadas, SHARK TANK MÃXICO ha logrado convertirse en un referente del emprendimiento en el paÃ­s; el programa ha recibido mÃĄs de 20,000 registros de proyectos para inversiÃģn, de los cuales apenas un 4% ha logrado presentar su âpitchâ a los âtiburonesâ. 

SHARK TANK MÃXICO es una adaptaciÃģn del reconocido reality Dragonsâ Den, creado por Nippon TV en JapÃģn. Este formato, distribuido por Sony Pictures Television, ha sido adaptado exitosamente en mÃĄs de 40 paÃ­ses. 

Para mÃĄs informaciÃģn, visita: 
https://la.sonychannel.com/series/shark-tank-mexico
https://www.instagram.com/sharktankmex/

ÂĄAcompÃĄÃąanos a revivir algunos de los mejores momentos de las diferentes temporadas que se han emitido por Sony Channel!

Las negociaciones entre inversionistas y emprendedores son reales. Los tiburones invierten su propio dinero, a su discreciÃģn. Cualquier acuerdo ante las cÃĄmaras estÃĄ sujeto al correspondiente proceso de debida diligencia por parte de los inversionistas y a que se suscriba un contrato vinculante entre emprendedor y tiburÃģn(es). Toda referencia a la unidad monetaria dÃģlar tiene un propÃģsito meramente informativo, y corresponde a la realidad del momento en que se realizaron las grabaciones.

snippet.title: Zack Snyderâs Justice League | Official Trailer #2 | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Supermanâs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

en.title: Degree Confluence Project, the most incredible collective plan
en.description:
Parallels and meridians are imaginary lines with which the entire surface of the Earth can be divided. Have you ever wondered what is at the points where they intersect between the two?

A group of people did, and the Degree Confluence Project was born. It is a collective project that set out to visit the confluences that exist on the planet. Would you like to know any? The good news is that you are likely to be relatively close to one, since it is not possible to be more than 79 kilometers from a confluence.

So far 40% of the goal has been reached, so there are still many to visit and register.

For those who want to know more about the project: confluence.org

Thanks to Fronteras Blog, where we learned about this story: bordersblog.com

ð Un Mundo Inmenso
Singularities of our planet

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Arsenal vs Tottenham Hotspur (2-1) | Premier League | Odegaard, Lacazette
snippet.description:
We came from a goal behind to deservedly win a dramatic north London derby.
It was no less than we deserved after a largely dominant performance, but we had to dig deep after Erik Lamela gave the visitors the lead.

Martin Odegaard levelled up before the break and captain for the day Alexandre Lacazette scored the winner from the penalty spot.

There were some late nervy moments - despite playing the last 15 minutes with an extra man after Lamela's red card - but we held on for a well-deserved confidence boosting win.

There's no doubt we made most of the early running, and we certainly were looking positive in possession, trying to mov the ball forward through the organised Tottenham rearguard.

Despite seeing plenty of the ball though, we didn't have a clear sight at goal until Emile Smith Rowe rattled the crossbar with a fine attempt from 20 yards. Hugo Lloris was well beaten in the visitors' goal, but the ball bounced away to safety.

Smith Rowe was the architect of our next chance, cutting the ball back from the byline to the lurking Alexandre Lacazette, but the Frenchman screwed his shot wide from six yards after attempting to open up his body and shoot across goal.

But our dominance began to fade and we were punished on the half hour. Lamela - an early replacement for Heung-Min Son - showed great technique to score inside the far post.

The goal was very much against the run of play, but we kept pushing and hit the woodwork for a second time when Cedric latched onto a loose ball just inside the box and crashed his effort against the upright.

We deserved to be on terms, and finally drew level late in the half through Odegaard. Kieran Tierney got away down the left, sent in a low cross which the Norwegian steered beyond Lloris via a deflection off Toby Alderweireld.

It was his second goal in four days after opening his account in Greece on Thursday.

It would have been an injustice to go in behind at the interval, and we continued to dictate the play early in the second half.

Nicolas Pepe was introduced for Bukayo Saka at the break, and the Ivorian's wonderful pass to Lacazette inside the box resulted in a penalty. Lacazette failed to make good contact with his shot, but was cleaned out by Davinson Sanchez. Referee Michael Oliver pointed to the spot and Lacazette himself dispatched.

Lamela saw red for an elbow on Tierney, but perversely the visitors improved after going down to ten men.

Harry Kane headed home a free-kick but was flagged offside as Spurs piled on the late pressure.

Kane then struck the post from a free-kick and Gabriel made a superb clearing header to keep out Sanchez's follow up strike.

It was nervy, but we held on for a thoroughly deserved victory.

#arsenal #arsenalhighlights #premierleague 

Enjoy match highlights, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, David Luiz, Vivianne Miedema, Nicolas Pepe, Alexandre Lacazette, Leah Williamson, Bernd Leno, Danielle van de Donk, Willian, Hector Bellerin, Jordan Nobbs, Bukayo Saka, Kim Little, Gabriel Martinelli, Thomas Partey and more.

A1 āļāļļāļāļ­āļĒāđāļēāļāļāļĩāđāļĄāļĩāļāļąāļāđāļŦāđāđāļāļ­āđāļāļŦāļĄāļāđāļĨāđāļ§ āļāļ§āļēāļĄāļĢāļąāļāļāļĩ āđ āļāļĩāđāļāļąāļāđāļĄāđāđāļāļĒāļāļ°āđāļŦāđāđāļāļĢ
I've given all I had for you. A good love I do never give to no one's.

āļĄāļēāļāļ­āļāļ§āđāļēāļāļąāļāļ­āļĒāđāļēāđāļŠāļĩāļĒāđāļ§āļĨāļēāļāļąāļāđāļāļ­āļāļ°āđāļāđāđāļŦāļĄ āļ§āļąāļāļāļĩāđāđāļĄāđāļĄāļĩāđāļĨāđāļ§āļŦāļąāļ§āđāļ āđāļĄāđāđāļŦāļĨāļ·āļ­āļāļĩāđāļāļĢāļāđāļŦāļāđāļŦāđāļĒāļ·āļ 
Tell me don't just waste the time with you? Space of your heart for me to stand was done.

*āļāļēāļāļāļāļāļĩāđāļĢāļąāļāļāđāļ­āļāļāļēāļĢāđāļāđāļāļāļāđāļĄāđāļĢāļąāļ āđāļāđāļāļąāđāļāđāļĄāđāđāļŦāđāļāļāđāļ­āļāļĨāļģāļāļēāļ āđāļĄāđāļāļģāđāļāđāļāļāđāļ­āļāļāļģāđāļŦāđāđāļāļĢāđāļŠāļĩāļĒāđāļ

Things are all tumbling down, it's gone now with the time.

āļāļģāļ§āđāļēāđāļĄāđāļĢāļąāļāđāļāđāļāļđāļāđāļāļē āđ āļāđāļāļąāļāđāļāļāđāļĄāđāđāļŦāļ§ āļāļēāļāļāļĩāđāļāļāđāļĄāđāđāļŦāļĨāļ·āļ­āļ­āļ°āđāļĢ āđāļĄāđāļĢāļđāđāļ§āđāļēāļ§āļąāļāđāļŦāļāļāļ°āļĨāļ·āļĄ

āļ­āļĒāđāļēāđāļŦāđāļāļĄāļąāļāđāļāđāļāđāļĢāļ·āđāļ­āļāļĒāļēāļāļ­āļ°āđāļĢ..āđāļāđāđāļāļ­āļāļĩāļāļāļīāđāļ§āļāļąāļāļāļ°āļŦāļēāļĒāđāļ
Need no such words to make me cry, or say goodbye cause I feel it. Let do the thing that's easier! Just snap your fingers and I'll disappear.

Lyrics:

A1 I've given all I had for you. A good love I do never give to no one's.
Tell me don't just waste the time with you? Space of your heart for me to stand was done.

*From the loved ones, becomes someone! Don't need to make big trouble, make it sorrow on me.
Need no such words made me injured, just snap your fingers I'll further gone.

A2 Things are all tumbling down, it's gone now with the time.
You needn't say loud, that you love me no more. Nothing has left from now, and I don't know how I will fade it away.

**From the loved ones, becomes someone! Don't need to make big trouble, make it sorrow on me.
Need no such words to make me cry, or say goodbye cause I feel it. Let do the thing that's easier! Just snap your fingers and I'll disappear.

snippet.title: TRITURADORA PUEDE MASTICAR VIDRIO BLINDADO
snippet.description:
ÂĄHOY vuelven los experimentos con mi trituradora! Vamos a hacer un crash test para ver que tanto resiste el vidrio blindado. He comprado vidrio de bancos para guardar dinero, es uno de los vidrios mas resistentes que hay. Vamos a hacer una prueba de fuerza, unos cuantos experimentos con vidrio blindado y se los mostraremos en camara lenta para que la diversion y el entretenimiento no tengan limites. Les mostrare mi reaccion a la trituradora y al vidrio blindado, veremos que resultados inesperados nos aguardan en estos videos divertidos. No te despegues del canal de los mejores experimentos, si te preguntas que hacer cuando estas aburrido, ya tienes la respuesta! Asi que vamos a experimentar

snippet.title: Raul Velasco y El Ridiculo Mas Grande de Su Vida | El dia que se llevo la regaÃąada de su vida
snippet.description:
Que tal amigos como estan el dia de hoy hablaremos sobre un episodio que tubo como protagonistas a raul velasco, amparo rubin, sergio andrade y un polemico y sofisticado cantante conocido como el zorro, un incidente lamentable que evidenciÃģ muchas cosas de  Siempre en Domingo y su presentador y productor.

Pues este seÃąor era el que decidÃ­a prÃĄcticamente el futuro de los artistas en los 70, 80s y 90s el poder que tenÃ­a por ser el productor del programa mÃĄs visto a nivel latinoamÃĐricano lo hacÃ­a jactarse que ÃĐl era el sar  de la mÃšsica, lo cual hasta cierto punto si era cierto. 

Entrar a ser parte del elenco de  Siempre en Domingo era todo un suplicio,  pues primero habÃ­a que caerle bien a Don Raul Velazco y el era una persona muy clasista, abusiva y dÃĐspota actitudes que ÃĐl mismo reconociÃģ al final de su carrera. 

Pero un dÃ­a le llevaron a un tal zorro y ÃĐl dio su visto bueno, porque quien lo llevaba era la productora Amparo Rubin, persona que era del grupo de productores amigos de Raul Velasco, y quiÃĐn es Amparo Rubin?. 

Amparo RubÃ­n no sÃģlo se ha desempeÃąado como compositora y cantante, sino tambiÃĐn como representante artÃ­stica y coordinadora de talleres de composiciÃģn musical, en los que se ha destacado por su creatividad e innovaciÃģn en conceptos para la enseÃąanza.

Su composiciÃģn mÃĄs exitosa es corro, vuelo y me acelero. Ejecuta por timbiriche Y que les puedo decir ese dia llego muy acelerada, creyendo haber encontrado a su gallinita de los huevos de oro, un muchacho que se miraba muy sofisticado, que nos hacÃ­a recordar a Robin Hood.


Bueno pues resulta que era la ÃĐpoca en la que  empezaba la decadencia de la mÃšsica en mÃĐxico, la llamada ÃĐpoca de los artistas plÃĄsticos y donde artistas con verdadero talento eran desechados.

El finado cepillin cuenta cÃģmo lo echaron y el dijo que pensaba que fue raul velasco, porque ellos querÃ­an tener el control, pero Cepillin si cantaba en vivo, tambiÃĐn juan gabriel se empezo a alejar de ellos debido a los prejuicios por su orientaciÃģn sexual, pero tambiÃĐn porque no pagaban, todo lo querian de gratis, pero eso es otro tema

En esa ÃĐpoca se empezÃģ a priorizar la imagen sobre todo, en donde los artistas con buena presencia, es decir guapos o guapas eran la prioridad de la empresa televisa.

Joan Sebastian  cuenta que para ÃĐl entrar a siempre en domingo, tenÃ­a prÃĄcticamente que tener un disco de oro y estar super popular en la radio. 

Entonces llega Amparo Rubin con un descubrimiento nuevo, un artista con buena presencia alto y de cabellera rubia, don Raul Velasco ni siquiera lo escucho cantar, haber porque a este

snippet.title: ÂĄPINTE A MIS HORMIGAS DE VARIOS COLORES!
snippet.description:
ÂĄChicos hice un experimento con hormigas y a que no adivinan...tengo hormigas que cambian de color! Se trata de las hormigas fellah o camponotus fellah...he preparado sirop de colores: rosado y azul. Los coloquÃĐ en un vidrio y espera a que las hormigas fellah llegaran y bebieran el sirop de colores. Resultados inesperados completamente: las hormigas cambian de color! Al beber el sirop de colores sus barrigas cambian de color, es una de las reacciones quimicas mas interesantes que he visto en mi vida, y por su puesto se los mostrarÃĐ en camara lenta para que la diversion y el entretenimiento no tengan limite. Adoro los experimentos caseros como este llenos de curiosidades, para mas videos divertidos y experimentos divertidos...date un paseo por mi canal! No te despegues del canal de los mejores experimentos, si te preguntas que hacer cuando estas aburrido, ya tienes la respuesta! Asi que vamos a experimentar

ÂĄSuscribir! - https://www.facebook.com/ellocotimon/
